titleStmt.title: SII 28.273: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 273. (A.R. No. 427 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, central shrine, on the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front.

p.hi: Kṛishṇarāyar Śaka 1430, Śukla, Mīna, śu. 7, Thursday, Viśākha. Irregular.
p.note: The cyclic year Śukla corresponded to the Śaka year 1430, expired or 1431 current. In the month MIna, śu. 7 cannot coincide with the asterism, ViśAkha. Such coincidence can occur only in the month of Siṁha. In the year Śaka 1430 (1508 A.D.) Siṁha .7 śu. Thursday, ViśAkha corresponded to August 3.

summary.p: Records that the local subordinate chief Eṟamāñchi Tulukkaṇa-nāyakkar granted some wet land (the portion mentioning the extent is damaged) and a house site to Nāchchurāṇḍār, as kāṇi-āṭchi, to be enjoyed hereditarily. For providing food-offerings and to arrange for the procession of the God Tirukkāmīśvaramuḍaiya-tambīrāṉār, in a chariot during the festival. The deity was to be taken to the presence of Śrīvili-nāyakar. This same chief also arranged for the making of the chariot. He decided to do all this on finding that after the time of the Pāṇḍyas there was no chariot for the deity.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahaāmaṇḍaleśvaran bhāṣaikku tappum Irāyar kaṇṭa
n muvarāyar kaṇḍan metinimiśurakaṇḍan kaṭṭāri sāḷuvan catucamutiṟātipati
śrīkṛṣṇarāyar pṛthuvirāśyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāptam
1000 4 100 3 10 Itanmel cellā niṉṟa cukkila caṅvaṟcarattu mina nāyaṟṟu
pūrvvapakṣattu saptamiyum prahaspativāramum peṟṟa vicākattu nāḷThe cyclic year Śukla corresponded to the Śaka year 1430, expired or 1431 current. In the month MIna, śu. 7 cannot coincide with the asterism, ViśAkha. Such coincidence can occur only in the month of Siṁha. In the year Śaka 1430 (1508 A.D.) Siṁha .7 śu. Thursday, ViśAkha corresponded to August 3.
makatai maṇṭalattu Āṟṟūr kūṟṟattu Āṟakaḻur nayiṉār tirukkā
micuramuṭaiya tampirāṉāṟkku śrīman mahānāyaṅkācāriyaṉ
tappum nāyaṅkar kaṇṭan nāḷoka kaṇṭan vaṅki nā
rāyaṇan śrīmatu Eṟamāñci tulukkaṇa nāyakkar tirukkāmicuramuṭaiya
tampirāṉāṟku pāṇṭiya nāḷukku pinpu te(r)rillāmal Irukkayil te
rum camaittu tirunāḷum naṭatti cīvili nāyakar tirumun Eḻuntaruḷumpaṭi ka
ṭṭaḷai Iṭukaiyil cīvili nāyakarkku cīpātam tāṅkumpaṭi nāccarāṇ
ṭārkku kāṇi Āṭci Āka koyilile tinamum nāṉāḻi Aruciyil A
mmutum muḷḷi kuḻi nañcai nilam 100m Oru maṉaiyum cantirātitta
varaiyum nāccarāṇṭārum yivan vaṟkattārum kāṇi Āka Aṉupavittuk(??)
koḷḷavum Itukku Akutam paṇṇinavāḷ kārāmpacuvai koṉṟa
pāvattile pokavum pi Ivai tiruñānacampanta paṇṭitar
Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 28.273 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
